source_section.title_label_raw: View Planes and Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes

sections.title_label_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: The Halifax Citadel view planes are set out and shown on Schedule 26, and the Dartmouth view planes are set out and shown on Schedule 28.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 399(3), a structure shall not be erected, constructed, altered, reconstructed, or located so that it protrudes into a view plane. Under no circumstance shall the maximum required building height, as shown on Schedule 15, be exceeded.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: Where a structure that lawfully existed on the coming into force date of this By-law protrudes into a required view plane, as shown on Schedule 26, a new structure may be erected, constructed, altered, reconstructed, or located so that it protrudes into the required view plane if the new structure does not increase the existing protrusion when viewed as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: for view planes 1, 3, and 5 from viewing position A;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: for view plane 6 from viewing position B;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: for view planes 2, 4, 7, 8, and 10 from viewing position C; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines View Planes
provisions.text: for view plane 9 from viewing position D. Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines

sections.title_label_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules 27A, 27B, and 27C:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: the locations and elevations of the Halifax Citadel ramparts;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: the locations and elevations of 12 viewing positions in the Parade Square of the Halifax Citadel; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: the location, elevation, and massing of the Cavalier Building.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 400(4), the Halifax Citadel rampart sight lines shall be projected in a 360-degree view above the ramparts from each viewing position.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 400(4), within the Halifax Citadel Ramparts (HCR) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F, a structure shall not be erected, constructed, altered, reconstructed, or located outside of the Parade Square of the Halifax Citadel so that it protrudes into any rampart sight line, from any of the 12 viewing positions in the Parade Square of the Halifax Citadel (Diagram 21).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: A new structure or an addition to an existing structure that would protrude into a required Halifax Citadel rampart sight line may only be permitted to be erected, constructed, altered, reconstructed, or located outside of the Parade Square of the Halifax Citadel, if:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: there is an existing protrusion by the Cavalier Building into a Halifax Citadel rampart sight line from its respective viewing position;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: the entire structure is blocked from view by the Cavalier Building from the viewing position; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: it cannot be seen from any other viewing position.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: No structure shall protrude into a required Halifax Citadel rampart sight line, unless permitted under Subsection 400(4).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Coordinates describing the following are shown on Schedules
provisions.text: When considering whether a structure protrudes into a required Halifax Citadel rampart sight line from the 12 viewing positions, the only structure located inside of the Parade Square of the Halifax Citadel that shall be considered is the Cavalier Building. Diagram 21: Halifax Citadel rampart sight line requirements, per Subsection 400(3)
